summary: CaseDetail.jsx refactoring testing complete. All 7 tabs (Documents, Timeline, Grounds, Notes, Reports, Legal Framework, Progress) are functioning correctly after the refactoring. Fixed missing import bug (MessageSquare, Users). Verified Documents/Notes/Reports section components integrate properly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility warning

passed_tests: Case detail page loads correctly with all 7 tabs visible
Documents tab - Upload Document button visible and dialog opens
Documents tab - Upload dialog has file input, category selector, description field
Documents tab - Extract Text and OCR Scan buttons visible when documents exist
Notes tab - Add Note button visible and works
Notes tab - Note creation works (toast confirms 'Note created')
Notes tab - Note edit works (update title, toast confirms 'Note updated')
Notes tab - Pin/Edit/Delete action buttons appear on hover
Notes tab - Note category badge displays correctly
Reports tab - Generate Report button visible
Reports tab - Report type selection dialog opens with Quick Summary, Full Detailed, Extensive Log options
Reports tab - Pricing badges shown for each report type ($29 AUD, $39 AUD)
Timeline tab - Add Event button works, dialog opens
Timeline tab - AI Generate Timeline button visible
Timeline tab - Empty state shows 'No events yet' message
Grounds tab - AI Identify Grounds button visible
Grounds tab - Add Ground button works, dialog opens
Grounds tab - Ground type selector and strength selector work
Grounds tab - Empty state shows correct message
Legal Framework tab - Victoria legislation shown (Crimes Act 1958 Vic)
Legal Framework tab - State selector visible (Victoria VIC)
Legal Framework tab - Sections displayed (s.3 Murder defined, s.3A Manslaughter, etc.)
Progress tab - Case Strength meter visible (shows 0, Early Stage)
Progress tab - Deadline Tracker visible with Add button
Progress tab - Appeal Checklist section visible
Progress tab - Recommendations section visible with action items

documents_section_component.details: DocumentsSection component properly integrated, upload dialog works, search functionality ready

notes_section_component.details: NotesSection component properly integrated, CRUD operations (create, read, update, pin) all working

reports_section_component.details: ReportsSection component properly integrated, report type selection dialog works, payment modal integration ready

timeline_tab.details: Timeline tab working with Add Event and AI Generate buttons visible

grounds_tab.details: Grounds tab working with AI Identify and Add Ground buttons

legal_framework_tab.details: Legal Framework viewer shows Victoria legislation correctly (Crimes Act 1958)

progress_tab.details: Progress tab shows Case Strength meter, Deadline Tracker, and Appeal Checklist

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing imports for MessageSquare and Users from lucide-react
bugs_fixed.fix: Added MessageSquare and Users to the lucide-react import statement

critical_code_review_comments: CaseDetail.jsx refactoring successful - line count reduced from 2294 to 1209 lines (~47% reduction)
DocumentsSection, NotesSection, ReportsSection components properly integrated
All props passed correctly: caseId, data arrays, setter functions, callback handlers
Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby causing console warnings (not blocking)
Consider adding data-testid attributes to more action buttons for easier automated testing
seed_data_creation: Created test user with session, test case 'Test Case for Frontend Testing'
context_for_next_testing_agent: CaseDetail.jsx refactoring verified complete. All 7 tabs functioning. Route pattern is /cases/:caseId (not /case/:caseId). Test session and case available for reuse. Minor console warnings about DialogContent missing aria-describedby but not blocking functionality.
